name: Imprudent Intrusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>償</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>不</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>知</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Your LP must be lower than your opponent's to activate and to resolve this effect.
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Destroy 1 monster your opponent controls with ATK less than or equal to the difference in LP.
● Special Summon 1 monster from your GY with ATK less than or equal to the difference in LP.
eff:
Your LP must be lower than your opponent's to activate and to resolve this effect.
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Destroy 1 monster your opponent controls with ATK less than or equal to the difference in LP.
● Special Summon 1 monster from your GY with ATK less than or equal to the difference in LP.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
